creator: juha.o.ylitalo@nokia.com
text:
If I have DVD movie (region 2 version from Matrix) in my DVD-ROM (http://www.lgeservice.com/8160b.html), launch xine (with deCSS) or gvlc , tell it to play movie from DVD, it starts to read DVD, mouse freezes and little while later system reboots.

Only real error messages that I can find from /var/log/messages is 
Oct 23 20:13:48 shoes /kernel: acd0: READ_SUBCHANNEL - ILLEGAL REQUEST asc=30 ascq=02 error=04
P.S. System nicely recognizes the device as acd0: DVD-ROM <LG DVD-ROM DRD-8160B> at ata1-master using PIO4, which is entirely correct.
